action.reasoning: Observation: Still segfaulting (exit 139) before any prints/loads despite local encoders and num_workers=0. History shows consistent crash tied to torch_geometric.nn/data/loader imports (C++ extension/version mismatch). No eval score yet. Analysis: Preinstalled PyG is broken in env (common with torch/PyG/CUDA combos); cannot reliably fix without network. Decision: Completely avoid PyG/ogb by switching to RDKit Morgan fingerprints (2048-bit) + simple 3-layer MLP for multi-task sigmoid BCE (with NaN masking). RDKit is preinstalled and stable; graph features easily convertible to mols for FP gen (precompute in dataset init). This gives working baseline for avg_precision on mol properties. Train 2 epochs, log to metrics.jsonl, submit_eval to get first score and measure time.
